articles.title: After Third Attempt on His Life, Trump Calls for Unity—But Will It Last?
articles.summary: Following a security breach at a Washington hotel, President Trump urged Americans to unite. But his history suggests the call for healing may be short-lived.

articles.title: Inside the World's Largest Art Heist: New Book Reveals Suspects in 1990 Gardner Museum Theft
articles.summary: A former FBI agent's new book names suspects in the $500 million Gardner Museum heist. The 1990 theft remains unsolved, but new details emerge.

articles.title: Iran Shifts Economic Policy to Ensure Food and Medicine Amid War Uncertainty
articles.summary: Iran reintroduces a cheap currency rate for essentials and taps its sovereign fund to buy food after US-Israeli attacks. Prices are soaring.
